---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---
::: {style="text-align: right;"}
Check my resume in pdf format!   [My CV](files/cv.pdf){.btn style="background-color: #1B9679; border-color: #1B9679; color: white;" target="_blank" role="button"}
:::

![](images/WhatsApp%20Image%202026-03-09%20at%2001.43.22.jpeg){fig-align="center" width="200"}

# Education

-   B.S., Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2020 - 2025.
-   M.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2025 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Internships

1.  **OYAK Renault Otomobil Fabrikaları A.Ş.** Bursa, Türkiye Jul 2025 -- Aug 2025\
    2025 *Production & Process Intern*

2.  **Odelo Otomotiv Aydınlatma A.Ş.**  Bursa,Türkiye Jul 2023 -- Aug 2023\
    *Process Engineering Intern*

# Projects

1.  **Generative AI Platform for Inventive Problem Solving (Graduation Project)**\
    Oct *2024 -- June 2025\
    TUSAŞ (TAI)*

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, PlayStation 2 softmodding

# Hobbies

Skiing, Chess, Football, Videogames
